title: Quantitative T1 MRI
author: Mathieu Boudreau
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Docker image built from the   reference repository/commit by roboneuro , based on the  latest change by the author , using repo2docker (through BinderHub).   To run locally:      docker load < DockerImage_10.55458_NeuroLibre_00019_0f9c84.tar.gz        docker run -it --rm -p 8888:8888 DOCKER_IMAGE_ID jupyter lab --ip 0.0.0.0        by replacing  DOCKER_IMAGE_ID  above with the respective ID of the Docker image loaded from the zip file.    For details, please visit the corresponding  NeuroLibre technical screening.   
   https://neurolibre.org
